title: scorzonera hispanica subsp. asphodeloides
intro: Scorzonera hispanica subsp. asphodeloides, also known as the Spanish scorzonera, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family that has a long history of use in traditional medicine. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones and other compounds that have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful for medicinal purposes. The health benefits of Scorzonera hispanica subsp. asphodeloides include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Scorzonera hispanica subsp. asphodeloides can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has been traditionally used to treat various ailments including fever, coughs, and respiratory issues.
